en: While exact details of the story are contested,
it's rumored that the pill, however,
froze to the freezer coils and broke,
foiling the CIA's plan and granting Castro many more days
ko: CIA의 계획을 저지하며 카스트로에게 더 많은 시간을 주었다.

en: to satiate his sweet tooth.
Ice cream has held a unique role in our world's history,
ko: 아이스크림은 우리 세계 역사에서 독특한 역할을 해왔다,

en: culture, and cravings.
But where did it come from?
The first accounts of cold desserts and iced drinks
ko: 차가운 디저트와 얼음 음료에 대한 최초의 기록은

en: date back as early as the first century.
In civilizations including ancient Rome, Mughal India,
ko: 고대 로마, 무굴 제국, 당나라 중국을 포함한 문명에서,

en: and Tang Dynasty China,
ko: 이러한 얼음 간식은 주로 왕족 엘리트들이 즐겼다.

en: these icy treats were mainly enjoyed by the royal elites.
ko: 이러한 진미를 얼릴 방법을 찾는 것은

en: And finding the means to freeze these delicacies
wasn't always easy.
Wealthy Mediterranean nobility
sent laborers to trek up high mountains
to harvest glacial ice and snow.
Meanwhile, ancient Persians built
shallow insulated pools of water
and utilized a technique known as sky cooling.
At night, the shallow pools would naturally radiate heat
ko: 밤에는 얕은 수조가 자연스럽게 열을 방출하여

en: into the dry desert skies,
causing the ice to melt.
